name: Vertex Pharmaceuticals
analysis: VRTX's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 12% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry $444.9300, stop $415.8099, target $498.0300 (1.82:1) — then trail it.
